title: Asia Pacific Conference on Psychology and Counselling
description: Co-organised by Taylor's University and the Ministry of Health (MOH), Malaysia.
fullDescription: The Asia Pacific Conference on Psychology and Counselling 2026 (APCPC 2026), taking place on 9–11 June 2026 at Resorts World Awana, Genting Highlands, Malaysia. APCPC 2026 brings together leading scholars, practitioners, policymakers, and students across the Asia Pacific region to engage in critical dialogue, knowledge exchange, and collaboration in psychology and counselling. Co-organised by Taylor’s University and the Ministry of Health (MOH), Malaysia, the conference offers a dual-track academic and industry platform designed to strengthen the connection between research, practice, and policy in mental health and counselling.
features: Detailed conference overview and event information
Call for papers and academic submission guidelines

title: Bazaar - Multi Language ECommerce Website
description: Multi language E-Commerce web application template.
fullDescription: Bazaar is a full E-Commerce template made with react and vite. This website supports multi language. Multiple payment sytem has been added to it for testing purposes. For example, Bkash, Cash on delivery, Card, Online payment. The webite has order tracking system also. The website contains an admin panel to control the website products.
features: Registration and login using supabase database
Multi payment sytem like Bkash, COD, Card and online payment for testing
